## Checklist

- [ ] `ruff check .` and `mypy` pass
- [ ] `pytest` (non-live) passes; new behavior is covered by a test
- [ ] Docstrings updated (tool docstrings guide LLM tool selection)
- [ ] Scope stays read-only / public-data (no orders, balances, or API secrets)
- [ ] For a new indicator: added a `REGISTRY` entry + a math/property test
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated (if user-facing)
